hero.title: Reliable environmental data to inform digital design and policy decisions
hero.description: naKnow is a collaborative initiative producing open scientific knowledge and environmental data on key digital components, to support informed decision-making across the digital value chain.

cards.card-2: Fully open access and open data outputs
cards.card-3: Publicly supported initiative, designed as a long-term commons

knowledge.title: Strengthening environmental knowledge on digital components.
knowledge.description:
Environmental considerations related to digital technologies are becoming increasingly central to industrial strategies, public action, and regulatory frameworks.

Life Cycle Assessment (LCA), in particular, is widely used to evaluate environmental performance and to inform design choices, investment decisions, and policy orientations across the digital sector.

To be effective, LCA-based assessments rely on robust, transparent, and well-documented environmental knowledge.

For many fundamental digital components, however, this knowledge remains unevenly structured, difficult to access, or insufficiently harmonised across actors. This situation limits the comparability of results and weakens their consistent use in decision-making processes.

details.title: Strengthening shared environmental knowledge on digital components is therefore essential to :
values: Improve the robustness of LCA results
Support more consistent decisions across the digital value chain

roadmap.title:
naKnow’s mission is to make high-quality
environmental knowledge on digital components openly and sustainably available, in order to strengthen the robustness, transparency, and usability of environmental assessments.

objectives.science: Produce openly accessible scientific knowledge on key digital components
objectives.public: Deliver open environmental datasets suitable for reuse by public authorities and practitioners
objectives.simple: Facilitate informed decision-making for non-expert and expert stakeholders alike

goal.title: What naKnow delivers.

open.title: An open online knowledge base documenting
values: And environmental assumptions for selected categories of digital components

dataset.title: All datasets and knowledge produced within naKnow are :
values: published as open resources and open data, using formats compatible with European practices
intended to support reuse by public platforms, including environmental reference databases.
Silicon wafers and derived components (CPU, GPU, RAM, SSD)
Optical components, including receivers and lasers

other.review: Review of scientific and technical literature
other.modelling: Modelling of manufacturing processes and global value chains
other.analyses: Laboratory analyses to support and refine assumptions
other.documentation: Transparent documentation of uncertainties and limits

goal.conclusion:
naKnow does not promote specific technologies, products, or industrial actors.
Its role is to document, analyse, and make data available.

axes.title: naKnow brings together partners from research, industry, and expert organisations, under the supervision of public authorities involved in the project’s steering.

partners.title: naKnow brings together partners from research, industry, and expert organisations
partners.france2030: is supported under the Econum call for projects, as part of the France 2030 initiative.

contact.title: contact
